category_sources: Official repository name and README identify pixz as a parallel indexed xz compressor.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best available documentation surface for pixz.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/vasi/pixz, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies parallel indexed xz compression.
source_facts.executables lists pixz as a command-line executable.
